CustomField.description: Please note: The data stored in this field is linked to the HomeKeeper National Data Hub. This formula shows the Discount Relative to Market Value plus the Total Buyer Subsidy. This is the total amount of public subsidy that impacts the buyer's price.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This formula shows the Discount Relative to Market Value plus the Total Buyer Subsidy. This is the total amount of public subsidy that impacts the buyer's price.
CustomField.label: Total Community Investment
